name: Dawn the Island's Wedgie Girl
description: Dawn the mystical aura reader is back for another season of Total Drama Island. There's only one problem that she has, that she's a really big loser. The nature lover was not known for her strength, but rather how easy it is to hoist her undergarments up any tree or flagpole in view. And now that once again she's stuck on the island filled with plenty of bullies, she has nowhere to run to escape the torrent of humiliations coming her way.
creator: EmeraldMallet
